issues.detail: The skill assumes a Python environment and AWS CLI, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: Test URL-preview for SSRF on AWS EC2
scenarios.rationale: Treatment names the exact IAM credentials metadata path, full filter-bypass catalog (decimal/hex/short/userinfo/fragment/DNS rebind/gopher), and the blind-SSRF detection triad; baseline mentions metadata generally but misses precise endpoints and breadth of bypasses.

scenarios.name: Harden Node link-unfurl endpoint + IMDSv2
scenarios.rationale: Treatment ports the BLOCKED_NETWORKS list including IPv6 fc00::/7 and link-local, enforces scheme allowlist, and gives the exact aws ec2 modify-instance-metadata-options --http-tokens required command; baseline lists the concepts without concrete IMDSv2 command or IPv6 ranges.
